name: Feather
effect: Reduces your weight by 10% for 30 seconds. Best saved for climbs, where weight matters most.

name: Draft Boost
effect: Increases the draft effect you receive for 40 seconds. Only helps while you are already drafting another rider.

name: Aero Boost
effect: Reduces your aerodynamic drag (CdA) by 25% for 15 seconds. Best at higher speeds on flats and descents.

name: Anvil
effect: Makes you heavier for up to 15 seconds so you descend faster. Only works on descents.

name: Steamroller
effect: Reduces rolling resistance for 30 seconds across surfaces such as dirt and cobbles.

name: Burrito
effect: Turns off the draft effect for riders in a cone-shaped window behind you for 20 seconds.

name: Ghost
effect: Makes you invisible to other riders for 15 seconds. Disabled within 400m of the finish.

name: Large Bonus
effect: Grants +250 experience points (about the equivalent of riding 12.5 km). No racing effect.

name: Small Bonus
effect: Grants +10 experience points (about the equivalent of riding 0.5 km). No racing effect.
